positive: Minimalist geometric abstract jungle flora pattern, featuring stylized silhouettes of tropical leaves, monstera, palm fronds, and abstract winding vines. The composition is a dense, repeating seamless pattern suitable for fabric printing. Style: Modern graphic illustration, highly stylized, clean vector art aesthetic. Color palette: Deep emerald green, jade teal, and burnt sienna contrasted against a creamy off-white background. Lighting: Flat, even studio lighting to emphasize silhouette clarity. Composition: Radial symmetry with strong central focus, perfect for all-over print. Clean lines, high contrast, print-ready vector quality.
